articles.content: Gemini did not immediately respond to a Reuters request for comment. Reuters could not immediately verify the report. tariffs delayed listing plans in April.

articles.title: 10 ex-staff of interior design firm make reports over unpaid commissions; director disputes amounts
articles.summary:
📰 기술 관련 뉴스
📢 10 ex-staff of interior design firm make reports over unpaid commissions; direct...
articles.content: They claimed they were each owed between $2,600 and $30,700 for at least 10 projects. The firm's director, Jason Wang, disputed the commission amounts and said he has been attending mediation sessions with TADM. One former employee has received payment following mediation, while the remaining nine cases are awaiting mediation, the...
